updateBanner.message: A newer version of Nexus Agent is available. Install to stay current with policies and fixes.

policies.title: Policies
policies.subtitle: Configuration your admin has pushed to this device — what gets intercepted, which hooks run, what's exempt, and the current sync status.
policies.notFound: Item not found in the current snapshot. The admin may have removed it.

hero.driftedMeta: {{behind}} version{{s}} behind. Agent will catch up on next config sync.
hero.killSwitchMeta: Interception is paused by admin. Reason: {{reason}}.

interceptionDomains.title: Interception Domains
interceptionDomains.subtitle: Hostname patterns this agent inspects.
interceptionDomains.searchPlaceholder: Search by pattern, name, or adapter…

detail.noPaths: No per-path overrides — every request to this host follows the default action above.

hooks.title: Active Hooks
hooks.subtitle: Compliance hooks evaluated against intercepted traffic, in priority order.
hooks.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, implementation, or stage…

detail.noConfig: No per-hook configuration set; the hook runs with implementation defaults.

pipeline.title: Pipeline overview
pipeline.summary: {{enabled}}/{{total}} enabled across {{stages}} stages — click to expand

exemptions.title: Exemptions
exemptions.subtitle: Hosts or users granted bypass from one or more hooks.
exemptions.searchPlaceholder: Search by host, user, or reason…

killSwitch.title: Kill Switch
killSwitch.subtitle: Emergency shut-off admin can engage from CP UI.

quicFallback.title: QUIC fallback bundles
quicFallback.desc: Browser & Electron bundle IDs whose UDP flows are closed so they fall back from HTTP/3 (QUIC) to HTTP/2 — required for the agent's TLS-bump path to actually inspect their traffic. Admin manages this list in the Control Plane.
quicFallback.empty: No bundles configured — agent does not close any UDP flows.

rulePacks.title: Rule Packs
rulePacks.subtitle: Compliance rule packs admin installed into your hooks.
rulePacks.searchPlaceholder: Search by pack name, maintainer, or hook…

detail.noRules: This pack ships with no rules.

traffic.title: Traffic Events
traffic.subtitle: Outbound network connections this agent intercepted on this device — process, host/IP, action and latency. Data is read from the local audit log and never leaves this machine.
traffic.emptyAi: No AI traffic captured yet. Toggle off "AI only" to see every intercepted connection.
traffic.searchPlaceholder: Search by host, IP, or process…

refresh.label: Auto refresh
refresh.tooltip: Re-fetch the page automatically with the same search and filter. Choose Off to freeze the view.

detail.title: Event Details
detail.hooksEmpty: No hooks executed for this event.
detail.payloadSpilled: Large body stored in spill ({{size}}) — view it in the Control Plane.
detail.payloadEmpty: Not captured (payload capture disabled or body spilled to remote store).

waterfall.noData: No phase data available for this event.

stats.title: Stats
stats.subtitle: Local rollup of this device's traffic, computed from your audit log. Never leaves this machine.
stats.breakdownEmpty: No breakdown data in this window.

emptyHint.successRate: No flows in this window — successRate becomes available once any request lands.
emptyHint.avgUs: No agent-overhead samples yet — populates once any flow completes the local pipeline.
emptyHint.avgUpstream: No upstream-total samples yet — populates from inspect flows that complete the upstream relay.
emptyHint.inspectRate: No flows yet — inspect/passthrough/deny mix needs at least one decision.
emptyHint.hookAllowRate: No hook decisions yet — needs at least one flow that ran the compliance pipeline.
emptyHint.bumpSuccessRate: No bump events yet — needs at least one inspect flow with a TLS handshake.

agentNotRunning.title: Nexus Agent is not running
agentNotRunning.body: The Dashboard couldn't reach the local agent. Make sure the Nexus Agent service is started, then retry.
agentNotRunning.troubleshootHint: If the agent stays stopped, launchd may have unloaded it. From Terminal you can re-bootstrap it (requires admin password):

hero.activeMeta: Agent {{device}} is active and applying the latest policy.
hero.pausedIndefinite: Indefinite pause — resume from the menu when ready.
hero.updateMeta: Install the new build to stay current with policies and fixes.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Agent lifecycle events on this device — when it started, was paused, signed in, or quit.

identity.title: Identity
identity.subtitle: How this device is registered with the gateway.

org.title: Organization
org.subtitle: Your organization in the company hierarchy.
org.name: Name

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Tools to inspect the agent's connection to the gateway.

interceptionMode.label: Interception mode
interceptionMode.fallbackWarning: WinDivert kernel driver did not load; using system-proxy fallback. Some apps that ignore system proxy may bypass filtering. Contact support.

actions.title: Recovery actions
actions.subtitle: Run these only when troubleshooting. The daemon stays running on a normal install.

restartDaemon.confirm: Restart the Nexus Agent daemon? Traffic monitoring will pause for ~10 seconds while launchd respawns it.
restartDaemon.success: Daemon restart requested. It will be back in ~10 seconds.
restartDaemon.clicked: Restart daemon clicked — confirm to proceed…

copyBundle.success: Support bundle ({{size}} chars) copied to clipboard.

copyLogPath.success: Log path copied. Paste it into Finder or Terminal.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Per-device preferences.
settings.accountSubtitle: How this device is registered with the gateway.
settings.themeDesc: Choose the Dashboard's light or dark appearance.
settings.signOutDesc: Sign out of the current account on this device. The agent will unenroll and the next launch will prompt you to sign in again.
settings.signOutConfirmBody: This machine will erase its enrollment credentials and signed-in state. Traffic monitoring will stop until you sign in again.

updates.title: Software updates
updates.desc: Check whether a newer Nexus Agent build is available from your gateway. Auto-update behaviour is admin-controlled (see Policies → Device defaults).
updates.foundNew: Update available: {{version}}. The agent will install it on next idle window.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your device needs to enroll with the company gateway before protection can start.
onboarding.ssoTitle: Sign in with your company SSO
onboarding.ssoBody: We'll open your browser so you can sign in. Your device will be registered automatically.
onboarding.tokenBody: Ask your IT admin for a single-use enrollment token, then paste it below.
onboarding.tokenRunning: Enrolling — this takes a few seconds…
onboarding.discoveringHint: Looking up how this device should sign in. This usually finishes in a few seconds.

reconnecting.title: Finishing setup
reconnecting.body: The agent is restarting with your new device certificate. This usually takes a few seconds.

tier.hint: Which decoder claimed this row: Tier 1 = exact protocol decoder (matched by key, host, or content sniff); Tier 2 = pattern probe for consumer web surfaces; Structural = typed projection of the raw HTTP body, no protocol decode; no badge = legacy raw verbatim row. "host-matched" replaces the confidence number when the adapter was chosen by host: its coverage is honest but not a trust score comparable to a sniffed decode.

sse.truncatedNote: Frame view truncated — the full stream was captured and is available in the Raw tab.

banner.failedHint: Switch to the Raw tab to see the original bytes.
banner.partialTitle: Partial normalize — some fields may be missing.
banner.empty: No normalized payload for this direction.
banner.unsupported: Unsupported kind. Switch to Raw to inspect.

dropped.title: Content dropped per storage policy.
dropped.hint: Operator set storageAction=drop-content for the hook that matched. The audit log retains decision + metadata only.
dropped.degradedTitle: Content dropped — the redaction policy could not be safely applied to the stored copy.
dropped.degradedHint: The hook's storage policy was redact; the stored copy was dropped because the redaction could not be safely applied to it. Cause: {{cause}}.
dropped.neutralHint: Content not stored per the storage policy. This row does not record whether the drop was the configured action or a redaction fallback.

cause.no-spans: the policy produced no redactable positions (no-spans)
cause.payload-unmarshal: the stored copy could not be parsed (payload-unmarshal)
cause.spans-unresolved: the redaction positions could not be resolved on the stored copy (spans-unresolved)
cause.marshal-failed: the redacted copy could not be re-serialized (marshal-failed)

embedding.binaryInputNotStored: Binary token-array input — not stored per audit policy.
embedding.vectorsNotStored: Embedding vectors are not stored per audit policy.

trafficDetail.tabNormalizedDisabled: No normalized projection was captured for this event (the flow was not inspected).
